title: Easy Queue
description: Hypixel mod that allows for easy queueing of games.
body:
This mod adds a new /q command which allows you to easily queue games on Hypixel by replacing complicated commands (such as wool_sheep_wars_two_six) with simple commands (such as sheep_wars)!

Currently supports every game on Hypixel.


<details>
<summary>Every Game & Their Respective Commands</summary>

## Arcade Games
**Blocking Dead**: blocking_dead

**Bounty Hunters**: bounty_hunters

**Creeper Attack**: creeper_attack

**Dragon Wars**: dragon_wars

**Disasters**: disasters

**Dropper**: dropper

**Ender Spleef**: ender_spleef

**Farm Hunt**: farm_hunt

**Football**: football

**Galaxy Wars**: galaxy_wars

**Hole in the Wall**: hole_in_the_wall

**Hypixel Says**: hypixel_says

**Mini Walls**: mini_walls

**Party Games**: party_games

**Pixel Painters**: pixel_painters

**Pixel Party**: pixel_party

**Throw Out**: throw_out or throwout

**Simulators**: easter_simulator, grinch_simulator, halloween_simulator, santa_says, scuba_simulator

**Hide & Seek**: party_pooper or prop_hunt

**Zombies**: Alien Arcadium: zombies_alien_arcadium or alien_arcadium

**Zombies**: Bad Blood: zombies_bad_blood or bad_blood

**Dead End**: zombies_dead_end or dead_end

**Prison**: zombies_prison or prison

## Bedwars
**Core Modes**: bedwars_solo, bedwars_doubles, bedwars_3s, bedwars_4s, bedwars_4v4

**Rush**: bedwars_2s_rush or bedwars_4s_rush

**Ultimate**: bedwars_2s_ultimate or bedwars_4s_ultimate

**Lucky Block**: bedwars_2s_lucky_block or bedwars_4s_lucky_block

**Voidless**: bedwars_2s_voidless or bedwars_4s_voidless

**Armed**: bedwars_2s_armed or bedwars_4s_armed

**Castle**: bedwars_castle

## Duels
**Classic**: duels_classic or classic_doubles

**Skywars**: duels_sw or duels_sw_doubles

**Bedwars**: bedwars_duels or bedwars_rush_duels

**Bridge**: bridge_duels_solo, bridge_doubles, bridge_threes, bridge_fours

**UHC**: uhc_duels_solo, uhc_duels_doubles, uhc_duels_fours, uhc_deathmatch

**Sumo**: sumo_duels

**Boxing**: boxing_duels

**Parkour**: parkour_duels

**Bow**: bow_duels

**Nodebuff**: nodebuff

**Combo**: combo 

**OP**: op_duels

**Mega Walls**: mw_duels

**Blitz**: blitz_duels 

**Quakecraft**: quake_duels

**Spleef**: spleef_duels

## Skywars
**Solo**: skywars_solo or skywars_solo_insane

**Teams**: skywars_teams or skywars_teams_insane

**Lab Modes**: skywars_lucky_blocks, skywars_doubles_lucky_blocks, skywars_tnt_madness, skywars_rush, skywars_slime

**Mega**: skywars_mega

## Murder Mystery
**Classic**: mm or murder_mystery_classic

**Double Up**: double_up

**Assassins**: mm_assassins

**Infection**: mm_infection

## Cops and Crims
**Defusal**: cvc_defusal

**Team Deathmatch**: cvc_tdm

**Gun Game**: cvc_gun_game

## Misc
**Blitz SG**: blitz_solo or blitz_teams

**Build Battl**: build_battle_solo, build_battle_teams, build_battle_pro, build_battle_pro_teams, speed_builders

**TNT Games**: tntrun, pvprun, bowspleef, tnttag, tntwizards

**Wool Games**: sheep_wars, wool_wars, capture_the_wool

**UHC**: uhc or speed_uhc

**Warlords**: warlords_ctf, warlords_domination, warlords_tdm

**Smash Heroes**: smash_heroes (Solo, Doubles, 1v1, 2v2)

**Classic Games**: vampirez, quake, paintball, walls, tkr, arena_brawl_1v1, mega_walls, pit

</details>
